channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs. Galaxy A37: Sibling rivalry
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37 are both new launches, set $100 apart. If you're shopping for a new mid-range Android phone, here's all you need to know before making a decision.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver
media:content.media:text: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver
media:content.media:title: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver

item.title: I finally drop-proofed my phone, and if you're like me, you should too
item.description: Clumsiest people on the planet, please gather. If you drop your phone five times a day like me, I have found the ultimate drop-proof phone hack.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: CASETiFY Cross-body Strap Phone Strap
media:content.media:text: CASETiFY Cross-body Strap Phone Strap
media:content.media:title: CASETiFY Cross-body Strap Phone Strap

item.title: Nothing Phone 4a Pro vs. Google Pixel 10a: A style-first phone vs a smarter one
item.description: Nothing and Google take different approaches to midrange smartphones at the same price.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 4a Pro Silver cameras from the launch in London
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 4a Pro Silver cameras from the launch in London
media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 4a Pro Silver cameras from the launch in London

item.title: Best Buy's 'Ultimate Upgrade Sale' includes dozens of great deals on Android tech — save up to $750 on phones, wearables, and more
item.description: Best Buy just launched a massive weeklong sale event, with hundreds of dollars off some of my favorite Android tech.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Garmin Vivoactive 6 and the Razr Ultra 2025 with the Garmin Connect app open

item.title: Amazon is still slashing 38% off the Sony WH-1000XM5, weeks after the spring sale
item.description: The Sony WH-1000XM5s are a powerful pair of headphones, even being last-gen.

item.title: Moto Razr Ultra 2026 probably won't make any huge waves with these alleged specs
item.description: Mild specs paint Moto's Razr Ultra 2026 in this rumor about what the company could bring consumers.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 in tent mode from above

item.title: Google Meet lands on Android Auto, but there’s a catch
item.description: Google Meet is rolling out on Android Auto with audio-only calls and basic controls, but it feels limited and rushed, especially with missing work features.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Android Auto launcher
media:content.media:text: Android Auto launcher
media:content.media:title: Android Auto launcher

item.title: Galaxy Watches are running out of battery way too fast after last month's patch
item.description: Galaxy Watch users are experiencing severe battery drain issues after Samsung's latest patch, and the troublemaker might surprise you.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic hands-on
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic hands-on
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic hands-on

item.title: Mint Mobile is now carving up to $900 OFF the Galaxy S26 — here is why it's one of the best Samsung deals on the web today
item.description: Mint Mobile just upgraded its best Galaxy S26 deal to include up to $400 of trade-in credit, in addition to a straight discount on the phone and 50% off a year of wireless.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.

item.title: Netflix is overpriced — these are the 3 streaming services I recommend instead
item.description: I ditched Netflix last year, and the latest round of price hikes confirm I made the right decision. These are the streaming services I pay for instead.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Netflix splash screen on a tablet

item.title: WhatsApp Web themes might soon come to save us from boring gray bubbles
item.description: WhatsApp Web is apparently testing 49 chat themes for more personalization, a massive jump from the current two-tone prison of light or dark mode.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: I didn't know I needed wireless HDMI until I used this dongle
item.description: Nyrius has a custom wireless HDMI transmitter and receiver that ensures you don't have to drag a long HDMI cable just to connect devices.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: Here's why the Nothing Phone 4a Pro is the only $499 phone I'd buy
item.description: If you've got just $499 to spend on a new phone, you might be surprised how much you can get with Nothing.

item.title: The wide foldable is finally here, and it didn’t come from Samsung

item.title: I went hands-on with the OPPO Find X9 Ultra, and it may just be the camera phone of 2026
